name: Saffron Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the butter in a skillet and sauté the onion in it.
2. Add the rice and sauté for a couple of minutes.
3. Add the white wine and broth, stirring well.
4. Simmer, uncovered, about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the saffron and Parmesan, then serve.
